subject: ClearPath Logistics application form missing on public job pages
summary: ClearPath Logistics launched a driver hiring campaign but public job pages showed job descriptions without application forms.
cause: A required EEOC custom question had an empty public label, so the form renderer hid the submit section.
resolution: Careers Site Platform patched the custom question label, republished affected jobs, and confirmed applicant submissions.

subject: MetroPulse Application form missing on public job page
summary: MetroPulse reported application form missing on public job page during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Form embed version was pinned to an older template
resolution: Republished the form embed and cleared site cache

subject: Northstar Legal Careers site custom domain cache served old page
summary: Northstar Legal reported careers site custom domain cache served old page during a recruiting workflow.
cause: CDN cache kept a retired page layout
resolution: Purged custom domain cache and verified public page

subject: OrbitCare Required custom question hid submit button
summary: OrbitCare reported required custom question hid submit button during a recruiting workflow.
cause: A required field had no public label
resolution: Added public labels to required questions

subject: Pioneer Games Published job not visible to applicants
summary: Pioneer Games reported published job not visible to applicants during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Job visibility was set to internal only
resolution: Updated job visibility and validated the application flow
